heading: Extension of dependent coverage
label: 300gg–14 Extension of dependent coverage
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2714 of act , was successively renumbered by subsequent acts and transferred, see .July 1, 1944section 238m of this title
Amendments2010—Subsec. (a). struck out “(who is not married)” after “adult child”.Pub. L. 111–152

Effective DateSection effective for plan years beginning on or after the date that is 6 months after , see , set out as a note under .Mar. 23, 2010section 1004 of Pub. L. 111–148section 300gg–11 of this title
amendments: Amendments2010—Subsec. (a). struck out “(who is not married)” after “adult child”.Pub. L. 111–152

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: A group health plan and a health insurance issuer offering group or individual health insurance coverage that provides dependent coverage of children shall continue to make such coverage available for an adult child until the child turns 26 years of age. Nothing in this section shall require a health plan or a health insurance issuer described in the preceding sentence to make coverage available for a child of a child receiving dependent coverage.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: b Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall promulgate regulations to define the dependents to which coverage shall be made available under subsection (a).

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: c Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to modify the definition of “dependent” as used in title 26 with respect to the tax treatment of the cost of coverage.
